message:
chore: remove mistakenly tracked target symlink

The target symlink (pointing to /data/tmp/cargo-target) was
accidentally committed despite target/ being in .gitignore.
Remove it from git tracking to restore proper gitignore compliance.

This is a server-specific build artifact path that should never
have been version-controlled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1 +0,0 @@
-/data/tmp/cargo-target
\ No newline at end of file
